name: dream-interpreter
description: Multi-cultural dream interpretation engine with rotating guest system. Six permanent perspectives (Chinese Mystic / Greek Oracle / Slavic Vedunya / European Prophet / Northern Shaman / Indian Brahman) plus three rotating guest perspectives selected from a pool of seven (Egyptian Priest / Japanese Miko / Mesoamerican Daykeeper / Polynesian Navigator / Yoruba Babalawo / Arabian Sufist / Scandinavian Volva). Structured JSON output for Dream Analysis Card rendering.
author: mingming, z-ai
